comment: Autonomous fire-and-forget multi-agent pipeline with strict loop prevention and automated PR creation.

plan.description: Orchestrator. Analyzes ticket, delegates to build agents, evaluates test results, and opens a PR upon success. Aborts on max iteration failure.

system_prompt_overrides.definition_of_done: Workflow is ONLY complete when the 'check' agent reports 0 lint/test errors. Upon success, use git tools to commit changes and open a PR. If build agents fail 3 times, commit the WIP with a [FAILED] prefix and abort.

build_heavy.description: Heavy runner for high-complexity features. Modifies code based on plan.

build_fast.description: Lightweight runner for simple typos or logic tweaks. Modifies code based on plan.

check.description: Strict validation agent. Executes `npm run lint` and `npm test` (or equivalent). Returns raw stdout/stderr to the orchestrator.
